marketplace.tagline: Search Reddit, YouTube, and X from one command
marketplace.long_description: Run research across multiple platforms without switching apps. Search Reddit, YouTube, and X/Twitter simultaneously or individually and get results summarized right in your chat. Great for market research and trend tracking.
